puzzles.name: KQ vs K
puzzles.hint: Bring your queen close to the enemy king while avoiding stalemate.

puzzles.name: KR vs K
puzzles.hint: Use your rook to cut off the king and force it to the edge.

puzzles.name: King & Pawn vs King (Opposition)
puzzles.hint: Take the opposition to force your king in front of the pawn.

puzzles.name: Distant Opposition
puzzles.hint: White wins by taking the distant opposition.

puzzles.name: Pawn Breakthrough
puzzles.hint: Sacrifice a pawn to create a passed pawn.

puzzles.name: Lucena Position
puzzles.hint: Build a bridge to shield your king from checks.

puzzles.name: Philidor Position
puzzles.hint: Keep checking until the white king leaves the pawn's side.

puzzles.name: Mate with Two Bishops
puzzles.hint: Use the bishops to control diagonals and drive the king to the edge.

puzzles.name: Mate with Bishop & Knight
puzzles.hint: Force the king to the corner that matches your bishop's color.

puzzles.name: Queen vs Rook
puzzles.hint: Use your queen to fork the king and rook.

puzzles.name: Rook vs Bishop (Wrong Color)
puzzles.hint: Head for the corner opposite the bishop's color to secure the draw.

puzzles.name: Pawn Race
puzzles.hint: Advance the pawn furthest from the black king.
